titles.en: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to isma'il Ibn Jabir
Clarification of the Transmission Chain to isma'il Ibn Jabir

segments: ه عن إسماعيل بن جابر فقد رويته عن محمّد بن موسى بن المتوكّل- رضي اللّه عنه- عن عبد اللّه بن جعفر الحميريّ، عن محمّد بن عيسى، عن صفوان بن يحيى، عن إسماعيل بن جابر.
arabic.text: ه عن إسماعيل بن جابر فقد رويته عن محمّد بن موسى بن المتوكّل- رضي اللّه عنه- عن عبد اللّه بن جعفر الحميريّ، عن محمّد بن عيسى، عن صفوان بن يحيى، عن إسماعيل بن جابر.

segments: Everything in this book that is narrated from Isma'il ibn Jabir has been transmitted by me from Muhammad ibn Musa ibn Al-Mutawakkil - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Abdullah ibn Ja'far Al-Himyari, from Muhammad ibn Isa, from Safwan ibn Yahya, from Isma'il ibn Jabir.
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text: Everything in this book that is narrated from Isma'il ibn Jabir has been transmitted by me from Muhammad ibn Musa ibn Al-Mutawakkil - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Abdullah ibn Ja'far Al-Himyari, from Muhammad ibn Isa, from Safwan ibn Yahya, from Isma'il ibn Jabir.
